workflow.intent: Generate a simulated receipt for an agent-assisted Solana action review before any wallet signature or transaction broadcast exists.

cost.note: Simulated receipt only; no wallet signature, transaction broadcast, priority-fee bidding, or fund movement.

execution.recovery_state: Requires verified program ID, RPC source, compute-budget estimate, wallet-owner approval, and human review before any transaction can be prepared for signature.

evidence.summary: The receipt records simulated Solana action-review context and explicitly blocks signing, broadcasting, private-key handling, fund movement, and unsafe automation.

artifacts.reason: Example uses placeholder account and instruction context.

privacy.disclosure: Simulation method, policy limits, and stop condition are visible; wallet, account, and prepared transaction details remain redacted.

review_notes: This fixture is a public-good Solana developer-tooling example, not a wallet, token, trading, or custody product.
The agent is denied signing, broadcasting, private-key handling, fund movement, unsafe RPC behavior, and investment advice.
A funded milestone should connect verified Solana program/RPC simulation data while preserving the same no-custody and no-unsupervised-action boundary.
